overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking along a snowy mountain trail at dusk. The character traverses an open path with stone walls, passes through a narrow rocky ravine, and approaches a fortified stone gate with warm torchlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: open mountain trail with stone retaining wall

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the mountain path with swords strapped to his back, moving past stone walls and pine trees

entered.detail: low stone wall running along the right side of the mountain path
steep drop-off and valley visible to the left of the path
tall evergreen trees scattered along the mountainside
patches of snow covering the dirt trail and surrounding ground

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide mountain trail at dusk, with Geralt walking along a dirt path bordered by a stone retaining wall on the right and a steep cliff view on the left. Snow patches cover the ground and pine trees dot the landscape under an overcast sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow rocky mountain pass between large boulders

events.description: path enters narrow rocky passage between large boulders, becoming more enclosed

agents.ego_description: Geralt continuing through the winding rocky terrain, navigating between large rock formations

entered.detail: massive rock formation crowding the left side of the path
large rocky outcrop on the right side creating a narrow passage

segments.scene_description: The trail narrows significantly as it winds through a rocky ravine, with large boulders flanking both sides of the path. The sky becomes mostly obscured by rock formations, creating a darker, more sheltered environment as Geralt continues walking forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: approach to fortified stone gate with torch lighting

events.description: warm orange torchlight becomes visible from the stone gate entrance ahead

agents.ego_description: Geralt approaching the illuminated stone fortress gate, moving toward the warm light

entered.detail: large stone archway entrance to a fortress with wooden doors
wooden barricade fencing along the right side of the approach
warm orange glow emanating from the gate entrance

segments.scene_description: Exiting the rocky passage, the path opens toward a historic stone fortress gate visible in the distance. As Geralt approaches, warm torchlight becomes visible from within the entrance, contrasting with the cool twilight. Wooden fences line the final approach to the stone archway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a snowy mountain trail that transitions from an open cliffside vista into a sheltered ravine and finally toward a fortified gateway. It begins on a wide dirt path bordered by a stone retaining wall and steep cliffs, with pine trees scattered across the snow-dusted landscape under an overcast dusk sky. As the camera moves forward, the trail narrows significantly, winding through a rocky ravine where large boulders flank the path and the sky becomes obscured by towering rock formations. The scene then opens up as the camera exits the rocky passage, revealing a historic stone fortress gate in the distance. The journey concludes as the path is lined with wooden fences, leading toward the stone archway where warm torchlight contrasts with the cool twilight of the mountains.
